{{Quote|I fill the days with games of Pazaak. Not that there's many people to play with, but a person should keep busy somehow. I'd play with that fellow in the cantina, but I find him... distasteful. He does not play for the same reasons I do.|Kudos to Revan|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
'''Kudos''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who stayed in the settlement [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] when their [[Starship/Legends|ship]] broke down and they had to wait for parts. Kudos did not step foot outside of Anchorhead, and didn't understand why anyone would. Kudos filled their days with the card game [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]], though there were not many players in Anchorhead.<ref name="KOTOR" /> In [[3956 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' dates the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' to [[3956 BBY]].</ref> the Rodian had heard about the [[Destruction of Taris|destruction]] of the planet [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] and spent time in Anchorhead's [[Hunting Lodge]] when the amnesiac [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] searched for a [[Star Map]] on Tatooine. Kudos had [[Color/Legends|copper]] skin, black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and wore a green and teal [[Clothing/Legends|suit]] with a utility belt.<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
